name: Natural Woven Tiered Tray Organizer - Threshold™
description:
Add natural charm to your space with the Natural Woven Tiered Tray Organizer from Threshold™. This tray organizer features a two-tiered woven wicker structure that provides ample space for your essentials and an artistic appeal you'll love. Designed with a metal frame, this natural tray organizer makes a functional addition to your vanity or any other space.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
